title: Tears & Cheers - Ghast Revamp
description: A simple touchup to the Ghast and Happy Ghast, making them more distinct and expressive!
body:
With the introduction of the Happy Ghast, Ghasts have been updated to have twice the texture resolution. However, I felt like they could've taken advantage of this increased space to give both Ghasts some visual identity, which is why this pack was made!

Changes:
- Both Ghasts now have their eyes lower and further apart, as well as additional subtle detailing, making use of their increased resolution.
- The two Ghasts are now more visually distinct from each other:
  - Happy Ghasts have a faint bluish tint to reflect their well-hydrated upbringing. They also look happier and lack tear marks.
  - Nether Ghasts look more dry and wrinkly to reflect how the Nether's drought has influenced them. They also look more visibly depressed.
- Dried Ghasts now have a unique item texture

This pack is also compatible with versions before 1.21.6 to just change the texture of the regular Ghast!

![Happy Ghast and Ghastlings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00eab1cd50e930d7c0cc1d3a40647612e50a4a27_0.webp)
![Nether Ghast and Piglins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flwLm9de/images/cc18d3899451cff89b753f7dd5c0034cd73bcaac.png)![Ghast shooting in a Soul Sand Valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flwLm9de/images/49cfe8d3dd61d805e8ab17d161bcb2102d0f2143.png)
